name: FAI_GENAI_METRICS
description: This table stores metrics for generative AI related requests or feedback.

columns.Name: METRIC_ID
columns.Comments: Autogenerated number and primary key for this table.

columns.Name: FEEDBACK_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key referencing the FEEDBACK_ID column in the FAI_GENAI_FEEDBACK table.

columns.Name: ORCHESTRATION_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key referencing the ORCHESTRATION_FLOW_ID column in the FAI_GENAI_REQUESTS table.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_GROUP
columns.Comments: The type or category to which the metric belongs. For example, a guardrail metric or feedback metric.

columns.Name: METRIC_NAME
columns.Comments: The name of the generative AI metric.

columns.Name: METRIC_VALUE
columns.Comments: The value of the generative AI metric.

columns.Name: METRIC_VERSION
columns.Comments: The version of the generative AI metric.

columns.Name: METRIC_STATUS
columns.Comments: The status of the metric during its computational lifecycle.

columns.Name: LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: The language code of the request related to the metric.

columns.Name: ORCHESTRATION_PHASE
columns.Comments: The phase of the orchestration process for the metric calculated.

columns.Name: HTTP_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: The http status code for orchestrator request count metrics.

columns.Name: ERROR_CODE
columns.Comments: The error code returned by a scoring component when the calculation of metrics has errored.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
